sections.heading: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title and,
sections.text:
Excise (Suspension) (Maize (Corn) Flour) Regulations, 2023. Commence-
ment
(2) These Regulations shall come into operation on
6th April, 2023.

sections.heading: The duty on maize (corn) flour of heading 1102.20.00 is Suspension
sections.text:
suspended to zero when imported by a holder of an import permit of customs
duty
issued by the Ministry responsible for agriculture.
S. MUSOKOTWANE,
LUSAKA Minister of Finance and
6th April, 2023 National Planning
[MFB.101/11/37]
